title: platanthera bifolia var. solstitialis
intro: Platanthera bifolia var. solstitialis, also known as the summer green orchid, is a rare and unique variety of the greater butterfly orchid, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The summer green orchid is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
